title: Alya Sometimes Hides Her Feelings in Russian
altTitles: Tokidoki Bosotto Russia-go de Dereru Tonari no Alya-san
description:
Alisa Mikhailovna Kujou, commonly known as Alya, is a beautiful and intelligent student who often appears cold and distant toward her classmates. Sitting next to her is Masachika Kuze, a laid-back student who constantly teases her and acts carefree in school. Although Alya frequently hides her true emotions behind sarcastic remarks and playful insults spoken in Russian, she secretly expresses her genuine feelings whenever she thinks nobody can understand her.

Unknown to Alya, Masachika actually understands Russian perfectly but chooses to keep it a secret while pretending not to notice her hidden affection. As the two spend more time together through school activities, daily conversations, and awkward yet heartfelt moments, their relationship slowly grows closer. Between comedy, romance, and emotional misunderstandings, Alya and Masachika begin discovering the feelings they keep trying to hide from each other.
